13. ECO SPEED/CONSUMPTION:
BALLAST:  ABT 12.5 KNOTS ON ABT 22.5 MT VLSFO + 0. 1MT LSMGO
LADEN:     ABT 11.5 KNOTS ON ABT 22.5 MT VLSFO + 0.1MT LSMGO
 
AT PORT: 
IDLE：   ABT 2.0 MTS LSIFO + 0.1 MT LSMGO PER DAY
BALLAST/DEBALLAST ：  ABT 3.5 MTS LSIFO + 0.1 MT LSMGO PER DAY
ADDITIONAL ABT 1.5 MT VLSFO DAILY FOR BOILER CONSUMPTION WITH TEMPERATURE LESS THAN 10 DEGREE CENTIGRADE.
 
(A) AVERAGE SPEED AND AVERAGE CONSUMPTION TO BE CALCULATED FROM SEA BUOY TO SEA BUOY EXCLUDING PERIODS OF SLOW STEAMING
ON CHARTERERS ORDER OR FOR REASONS OF SAFETY OR STANDING BY OR ASSISTING ANOTHER VESSEL IN DISTRESS.
(B) SPEED AND CONSUMPTION BASIS GOOD WEATHER CONDITIONS. GOOD WEATHER DEFINITION AS PER OWNERS CP, EXTRAPOLATION OF “GOOD WEATHER” PERFORMANCE FOR “BAD WE ATHER” PERIODS IS NOT ALLOWED.
(C)VESL MAY BURN SMALL QTYS OF LSMGO WHEN MANEUVERING IN SHALLOW&NARROW WATERS ENTERING/LEAVING PORTS/IN HEAVY WEATHER/CANAL/RIVER/BALLAST/DEBALLAST ETC.
(D) 0.5 KNOT ALLOWANCE  TO BE APPLIED FOR SPEED ASSESSMENT, 5% ALLOWANCE FOR OWNER TO BE APPLIED TO BUNKER CONSUMPTION.
(E) BUNKER SAVING TO OFFSET ANY TIME LOST AND VICE VERSA.
(F) BUNKER SUPPLIED BEING OF ISO8217:2017 (E)  SPECIFICATION, OR 2010, IF 2017 IS NOT AVAILABLE
 
= ALL DETAILS ABOUT=

MV CL DENGSHA HE
2021 BUILT SDBC BY NEW DAYANG SHIPYARD, YANGZHOU, CHINA

DWT 63,118 MT AT 13.3M (SCANTLING / SUMMER)

L / B 199.99M / 32.26M
5 HO / 5 HA
G/B 77,323.6 M3 / 75,390.5 M3
TPC 62.1
4 X 36 MT SWL DECK CRANE / 4 X 12 CBM RADIO-CONTROLLED GRABS
MOORING: 12 * POLYESTER & POLYPROPYLENE MIXED ROPE / LENGTH 200 METERS
SPEED & CONSUMPTION (ON SCANTLING DRAFT):
LADEN/ABOUT 14.0 KNOTS ON ABOUT 29.64 MTS VLSFO PLUS 0.1 MTS LSMGO
BALLAST/ABOUT 14.5 KNOTS ON ABOUT 26.65 MTS VLSFO PLUS 0.1 MTS LSMGO
ECO LADEN/ABOUT 13.0 KNOTS ON ABOUT - 23.50 MTS VLSFO PLUS 0.1 MTS LSMGO
BALLAST/ABOUT 13.5 KNOTS ON ABOUT 20.80 MTS VLSFO PLUS 0.1 MTS LSMGO
PORT CONSUMPTION:
ABOUT 2.6 MT VLSFO PLUS 0.1 MT LSMGO - WITHOUT USING SHIP'S GEAR
ABOUT 5 MT VLSFO PLUS 0.1 MT LSMGO - DURING CARGO OPERATION BY SHIP'S GEAR
ALL DETAILS ABOUT
DURING ECO STEAMING PERIOD THE VESSEL WILL RUN AT FULL NORMAL RPM FOR ABOUT 2 TO 3 HOURS PER DAY IN ORDER TO AVOID EXCESSIVE CARBON ACCUMULATION AND MAINTAIN THE NORMAL OPERATION OF THE ENGINE, ADDITIONAL BUNKER CONSUMED FOR SUCH RAISE RPM TO BE FOR CHARTERERS' ACCOUNT.
ADDITIONAL CONSUMPTION OF ABOUT 2 MT IFO PER DAY WHEN BALLASTING/DE-BALLASTING / EXCHANGE OF BALLAST OPERATION AND CARGO HOLDS’ CLEANING, EXCLUDING BALLAST WATER TREATMENTS.
VESSEL HAS LIBERTY TO USE LSMGO IN MAIN ENGINE WHILE MANEUVERING IN / OUT OF PORTS, RIVERS, STRAITS, CANALS, SHALLOW / NARROW OR RESTRICTED WATERS.
SPEED AND CONSUMPTION BASIS GOOD WEATHER CONDITIONS OF UP TO BEAUFORT FORCE 4 AND DOUGLAS SEA STATE 3 (SIGNIFICANT WAVE HEIGHT 1.25M) WITH NO ADVERSE CURRENTS AND NO NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF SWELL AND NO ABNORMAL CONDITIONS AFFECTING IN 24 CONSECUTIVE HOURS.
VESSEL’S PERFORMANCE SHOULD BE ASSESSED/CONSIDERED ON THE BASIS OF AVERAGE SPEED AND CONSUMPTION ON SEA PASSAGES FROM SEA BUOY TO SEA BUOY EXCLUDING ANY VOYAGE LESS THAN 48 HOURS DURATION, AND PERIODS DURING WHICH REDUCTIONS OF SPEED FOR SAFETY, REDUCED VISIBILITY, CANALS, NARROW/RESTRICTED WATERS AND ALWAYS IN GOOD WEATHER CONDITIONS.
ABOUT MEANS 0.5 KNOT ALLOWANCE ON SPEED AND 5% ALLOWANCE ON BUNKER CONSUMPTION.
BUNKER SAVING TO OFFSET ANY TIME LOSS AND VICE VERSA FOR EACH VOYAGE (BALLAST AND LADEN).
=======

V032, BAYOVAR (L), GRESIK (D), SGP (B), DUMAI (D), PHOSROCK, UB;
V033, MUARA BERAU (L), SGP (B), KANDLA (D), COAL, UB - TRANS POWER CO., LTD;
V034, SUR (L), NECOCHEA (D), SAN NICOLAS (D), VILLA CONSTITUCION (D), SAN LORENZO (D), UREA, UB;
V035, SAN LORENZO (L), ZONA COMUN (B), MAGELLAN ST (T), GUAYAQUIL (D), SBM
V036, CALETA COLOSO (L), XIAMEN (D), SHANGHAI (D), COPPER CONC
THE VESSEL NOW DRY DOCKING AT SHANGHAI COSCO SHIPYARD.
ESTIMATE TO BE DELIVERED TO CHTRS AT DLOSP CJK O/A 2ND-3RD/DEC 2025
BUNKER ESTIMATE ON DELIVERY VLSFO ABOUT 440 MT AND LSMGO ABOUT 210 MT.
PLS CHTRS CONFIRM AND ADVICE THEIR INTENTION FOR THE 1ST VOYAGE IN DUE COURSE.

WHILE BALLASTING OR DEBALLASTING OPERTION, ADDITIONAL 1.5MT IFO PER DAY.

EXTRAPOLATION OF “GOODWEATHER” PERFORMANCE FOR “BAD WE ATHER” PERIODS IS NOT ALLOWED.
